meta.title: Revenue Engine Maturity Audit
meta.description: 5 Questions. 60 Seconds. Get your customized scaling roadmap.

hero.title: Is Your Business Ready to Scale?
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing. Diagnose your revenue engine with 5 strategic inspections.

questions.question: How strictly do you track lead sources?

options.label: We don't track specifically; we just look at total leads.
We track granular UTMs and first-touch attribution per campaign.

questions.question: What is your primary method for nurturing leads?

options.label: Multi-channel behavioral triggers (Email + SMS + Ad Retargeting).

questions.question: How defined is your sales process?

options.label: We have a script and a CRM.
Documented playbooks with objection handling and automated follow-ups.

questions.question: How do you handle payment and onboarding?

options.label: Manual invoicing and manual account setup.
Fully integrated Checkout » Provisioning » Access workflow.

questions.question: Do you measure Net Revenue Retention (NRR)?

options.label: No, we focus only on new sales.
Yes, we verify upsells and expansion revenue alongside churn.

tier_1.title: Status: Fractured
tier_1.description: Your revenue engine has significant leaks. You are likely bleeding leads at the top of the funnel and missing operational rigor.
tier_1.recommendation: We recommend the **90-Day Partnership** to build your foundation.

tier_2.title: Status: Fragmented
tier_2.description: You have the pieces, but they aren't talking to each other. Your systems are creating friction that slows down growth.
tier_2.recommendation: Use the **RJAT (Revenue Journey Assessment Tool)** for a deep-dive forensic audit.

tier_3.title: Status: Unified
tier_3.description: Your engine is powerful but likely needs tuning for maximum torque. You are ready to scale aggressively.
tier_3.recommendation: Book a **Strategy Call** to discuss specific scaling vectors.
